```{=html}
<div style="width:88%;margin:0 auto;background-image:radial-gradient(circle,#E0DBE5 0.6px,transparent 0.6px);background-size:18px 18px;padding:1.5em 1em;border-radius:18px;">

 <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,minmax(0,1fr));gap:0.9em;">

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:16px;padding:1.05em 1.1em 1.15em;box-shadow:0 6px 22px rgba(212,95,71,0.12);text-align:left;">
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.45em;color:#9B8EA0;letter-spacing:0.16em;margin-bottom:0.55em;">01</div>
   <div style="width:2.2em;height:2.2em;border-radius:0.55em;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#FCEEEC,#FAD9D2);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#D45F47;margin-bottom:0.6em;"><i data-lucide="folder-plus" style="width:1em;height:1em;stroke-width:1.8;"></i></div>
   <div style="font-size:0.62em;font-weight:700;color:#D45F47;margin-bottom:0.55em;">Create a folder</div>
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#7A2418;background:#FCEEEC;padding:0.3em 0.55em;border-radius:6px;display:inline-block;letter-spacing:0.02em;">mkdir tom-hanks-bio</div>
  </div>

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:16px;padding:1.05em 1.1em 1.15em;box-shadow:0 6px 22px rgba(58,125,201,0.12);text-align:left;">
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.45em;color:#9B8EA0;letter-spacing:0.16em;margin-bottom:0.55em;">02</div>
   <div style="width:2.2em;height:2.2em;border-radius:0.55em;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#DCE9FA,#B5D0F0);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;margin-bottom:0.6em;"><img src="figs/positron-icon.png" alt="Positron" style="width:1.4em;height:1.4em;object-fit:contain;display:block;margin:0;" /></div>
   <div style="font-size:0.62em;font-weight:700;color:#3A7DC9;margin-bottom:0.55em;">Open it in Positron</div>
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#234E80;background:#EAF1FB;padding:0.3em 0.55em;border-radius:6px;display:inline-block;letter-spacing:0.02em;">File › Open Folder…</div>
  </div>

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:16px;padding:1.05em 1.1em 1.15em;box-shadow:0 6px 22px rgba(204,120,92,0.14);text-align:left;">
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.45em;color:#9B8EA0;letter-spacing:0.16em;margin-bottom:0.55em;">03</div>
   <div style="width:2.2em;height:2.2em;border-radius:0.55em;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#FBEEE8,#F5D9CD);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;margin-bottom:0.6em;"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="#CC785C" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" style="width:1em;height:1em;display:block;"><path d="M17.3041 3.541h-3.6718l6.696 16.918H24Zm-10.6082 0L0 20.459h3.7442l1.3693-3.5527h7.0052l1.3693 3.5528h3.7442L10.5363 3.5409Zm-.3712 10.2232 2.2914-5.9456 2.2914 5.9456Z"/></svg></div>
   <div style="font-size:0.62em;font-weight:700;color:#CC785C;margin-bottom:0.55em;">Launch Claude Code</div>
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#8A4B2F;background:#FBEEE8;padding:0.3em 0.55em;border-radius:6px;display:inline-block;letter-spacing:0.02em;">claude</div>
  </div>

 </div>

</div>
```
